entities.name: TREES

entities.description: The account of water entering and leaving a soil-plant system

entities.name: SOIL PH

entities.name: MANAGEMENT CONTROLS

entities.name: ON-FARM DECISION MAKING
entities.description: The process of making choices regarding farm management

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS DESIGN

entities.description: Predicting climate patterns for a specific season

entities.name: AGRIBUSINESS ACTIVITIES

entities.description: Standards for the disposal and recycling of agricultural waste

entities.name: GOVERNMENT POLICY MAKING
